deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'node scripts/diag-network.mjs || true; n=1; until npx prisma migrate deploy; do if [ $n -ge 3 ]; then echo "FATAL: prisma migrate deploy gagal — lihat DIAGNOSTIK di atas."; exit 1; fi; echo "migrate deploy gagal — percobaan $n/3, ulang dalam 5s"; n=$((n+1)); sleep 5; done; echo "[start] Next.js listen di 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-3000}"; exec npx next start -H 0.0.0.0 -p ${PORT:-3000}'
